message:
fix(codegen): Skip exception name parameters when not used in try body

- Exception names (from "except E as e") only need to be passed as
  parameters to TryHelper.run() if they're used inside the try body
  (e.g., nested try blocks where inner handlers reference the variable)
- If exception name is only assigned in the catch block (outside run()),
  don't pass it as parameter to avoid "unused function parameter" errors
- Use variable_usage.isNameUsedInBody() to check actual usage
- Fixes exception name scoping for both simple and nested try scenarios
